creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text: This still seems to be an issue with upgrades using freebsd-update. I updated to, if I recall correctly, 12.0-RC1 several weeks ago and got an error on boot "pid file /var/db/ntp/ntpd.pid: Permission denied". The directions above fixed it. I skipped RC2 and updated to RC3 today from RC1 and got the error again. I have another system I've been updating via source, and I haven't had this issue on the source-based system.
